notes: CodificationSection, , , proposed a transfer of the appropriations authorized for the Federal Alcohol Administration created by to the Administration created by . It was to have taken effect when a majority of the members authorized to be appointed under took office. The members, however, were never appointed.act June 26, 1936, ch. 830, title V, § 50449 Stat. 1965section 202 of this titlesection 202b of this titlesection 202b of this title
